# DevOps Lead

DevOps lead. Manages CI/CD, infrastructure, deployments, monitoring, and incident response.

## Configuration

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Module | `builtin:chat` |
| Model | `default` |
| Provider | `default` |

System prompt instructs platform engineering expertise: CI/CD pipelines, container orchestration, IaC, observability, and security hardening.

## Skills

- `file_read`, `file_write`, `file_list`, `shell_exec`, `memory_store`, `memory_recall`, `agent_send`

## Usage

```bash
librefang agent run devops-lead
```
